project.name: APEC 2026 Shenzhen
project.styleDefinitionBrief: International summit host city portal — jade green + gold on warm ivory, editorial serif headings, clean card layouts with generous whitespace. Dignified, welcoming, culturally informed.
project.designRead: Government event portal / foreign delegates / dignified cultural warmth / medium density / avoid neon tech and AI buzzword hero

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: Jade green #1a6b4a used for primary navigation, active states, CTAs, and section accents
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: Gold #b8860b as secondary accent for overlines, decorative elements, and highlights only

styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC for headings; Inter + Noto Sans SC for body. No per-page font experiments.
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: generous whitespace, 8rem+ section padding, editorial rhythm
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-first cards, minimal shadows (alpha <= 0.05), warm ivory backgrounds
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border/surface layering for cards; shadow only for floating layers (alpha <= 0.05)
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: real photography, editorial style, no illustrations
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: refined transitions (250ms), subtle hover lifts, clean focus states

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: sticky top nav: logo left, nav links center, language toggle right. Jade green background with white text. Mobile: hamburger.
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: Jade green #1a6b4a as single primary brand hue; gold #b8860b as decorative accent only
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC headings (h1-h2), Inter + Noto Sans SC body (h3+). CJK + Latin dual-script support.
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: border-first for static cards/sections; shadow only for modals/dropdowns with alpha <= 0.05
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: jade green solid buttons, white text, 8px radius, hover darkens to --color-primary-dark
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: left-aligned content, centered hero text, max-width 1280px container with auto margins

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Custom jade green + gold palette on warm ivory. Playfair Display serif headings with Noto Serif SC fallback. Generous editorial spacing, border-first cards, minimal shadows.

pages.title: Home
pages.businessScenario: Welcoming landing page for APEC 2026 delegates — sets the tone, introduces Shenzhen, and provides key navigation
pages.visualNorthStar: An editorial, dignified first impression — full-bleed hero with Shenzhen skyline, gold overline 'APEC 2026', serif headline 'Welcome to Shenzhen', with a warm ivory content section below featuring quick-info cards
pages.compositionPattern: Full-bleed hero with asymmetric text overlay → editorial intro section → quick-info card grid → key highlights

pages.title: Explore Shenzhen
pages.businessScenario: Comprehensive city guide — attractions, districts, culture, food, nature
pages.visualNorthStar: Editorial city guide with rich content cards — organized by districts with vivid descriptions, cultural insights, and practical visitor information
pages.compositionPattern: Section-based editorial layout — district profiles with offset image-text pairs, cultural highlights in card grid, nature/beaches section with horizontal cards
qualityRisks: content-heavy page — maintain readability with generous spacing

pages.title: Plan Your Visit
pages.businessScenario: Practical travel planning — transportation, visa, hotels, weather, tipping, emergency numbers, mobile payments
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean, organized reference page with icon-accented info blocks — scannable, practical, not overwhelming. Accordion-style sections for transport, visa, hotels, etc.
pages.compositionPattern: Structured reference layout — icon-led info blocks in grid, tabbed or accordion sections for detailed info, clear visual hierarchy
qualityRisks: information-dense — use cards and spacing to avoid wall-of-text

pages.title: APEC 2026 Guide
pages.businessScenario: APEC-specific information — meeting overview, venue details, key dates, protocol tips, nearby points of interest
pages.visualNorthStar: Authoritative but approachable — APEC branding with jade green accents, structured timeline of events, venue information, and protocol guidance
pages.compositionPattern: Editorial with structured blocks — event timeline, venue info cards, protocol dos/don'ts, FAQ accordion

assets.semanticDescription: Shenzhen modern skyline at dusk with Ping An Finance Centre, viewed across Victoria Harbour
Aerial view of Shenzhen cityscape showing Futian CBD and green spaces
Modern convention center in Shenzhen suitable for APEC summit meetings
